title: Gate model versions behind health checks and rollback
description: Treat a model version as a deployable artifact: validate it on a canary before full traffic and keep the prior version ready to restore.
body: Use when promoting a new model into serving. Do not swap the served model in place with no validation — a regressed or corrupt artifact then degrades every request at once. Actions: load the new version, run a health/shadow check on real traffic shape, route a small canary share, watch quality and latency metrics, then ramp; keep the previous version loaded for instant rollback. Validation signals include a passing health check and canary metrics within bounds before ramp. Risk boundary: a bad model rollout is a production incident; require a verified rollback path and confirm canary metrics before sending full traffic.
